steps.title: Substitute y = 6 into the equation
steps.content:
We're told there are 6 select grade Lincoln Pennies in the collection, so $y = 6$. Substitute this value into the equation:
$$8x + 11(6) = 170$$

steps.title: Solve for x by isolating it
steps.content:
Simplify the left side:
$$8x + 66 = 170$$
Subtract 66 from both sides:
$$8x = 104$$
Divide both sides by 8:
$$x = 13$$
There are 13 premium grade Log Cabin Pennies in the collection.
